label: Omnisend
description: Sync customers, products, orders, and carts with Omnisend for email and SMS marketing automation

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in Omnisend → Profile → Integrations & API → API Keys

fields.label: Store URL
fields.description: Your storefront URL (e.g. https://mystore.com) — used to build product and cart links sent to Omnisend

fields.label: Enable Integration
fields.description: Activate real-time syncing of customers, products, orders, and carts to Omnisend

fields.label: Use Display Locale
fields.description: Fetch orders and carts in their display locale before syncing to Omnisend
